# Fleet cockpit consumes the dock tear-out seam

## Context

Epic `#15239` leaf — the seam's first CONTRACTED product consumer (D#15204 cycle-4c, @neo-fable's deposit `DC_kwDODSospM4BDXXd`): the `#14610` successor's interaction grammar routes through the G1/G2 tear-out seam per the contract deposited on `#14610`, with the banked salvage from the accepted PR `#15215` Drop+Supersede (owner accessor, preserved-park, the two-window witness). The lane belongs to the `#14610`/`#14613` family — @neo-fable's self-selected stream; filed here so the epic's v1 leaf set is complete and the criteria are not lost (assignment stays self-select).

## The Problem

The FM cockpit's agent-detail pop-out (`#14610`, re-opened after PR `#15215` closed unmerged) must NOT build its own window-detach machinery — it consumes the epic's dock seam, proving the choreography on a real product surface (agentos = FM home, per the operator-ratified app taxonomy) rather than only on demos.

## The Architectural Reality

- `apps/agentos` Fleet cockpit: the card → agent-detail drill (currently regressed, `#15212`, Euclid's lane — a blocker this leaf waits out).
- The consumption shape: the detail pane detaches through the SAME dock semantics G1 ships (`detachItem` → vessel; the `#15240` outcome machine; `#15245` acquisition contract) — the cockpit adds product intent (which pane, when offered), never mechanism.
- The `#15215` salvage: owner accessor, preserved-park behavior, and the two-window witness carry into this implementation.
- Blocked-by: `#15244` (G1) + `#15245` (G2) + `#15212` (the drill regression).

## The Fix

One PR in the cockpit: the agent-detail pop-out consuming the tear-out seam — offered from the drill surface, detaching to a real OS window on the shared heap (live stores streaming), returning through the standard reintegration path.

## Acceptance Criteria (from the deposited consumer contract)

- [ ] The agent-detail pane detaches to a real OS popup through the epic's seam (no cockpit-local window machinery); the drill's live data streams uninterrupted across the transition (same-instance permanence witnessed).
- [ ] The pop-out participates in standard reintegration (drag back or keyboard return) with exact restore (the `#15247` stored-index semantics).
- [ ] The `#15215` salvage is consumed where applicable (owner accessor; preserved-park; the two-window witness updated to the seam's contract).
- [ ] Every terminal follows the `#15240` outcome machine; a blocked popup fails closed per `#15245` (drill stays in-window, zero mutation).
- [ ] The `#15212` drill regression is a hard predecessor — this leaf lands only on a working drill.

## Out of Scope

The seam itself (G1/G2 own mechanism) · FM feature work beyond the pop-out consumption · the `#15212` fix (Euclid's lane).

## Related

Parent `#15239` · blocked-by `#15244` + `#15245` + `#15212` · `#14610` / `#14613` (the family) · PR `#15215` (the salvage source) · D#15204 cycle-4c.
